name: period-comparison
description: Period-comparison chart-family workflow with exports, source packs and Codex interpretation.

interface.shortDescription: Run previous-year comparison charts with reviewable source data.
interface.longDescription: Self-contained period-comparison workflow for CSV or Excel sales datasets. It inspects date, metric and dimension mappings, asks only unresolved material choices, prepares actual-versus-previous-year data through the original preparation pipeline, renders year-over-year column, line, by-period, slope, dot/dumbbell and bridge charts through the original chart functions, adds compact scenario/variance tables, adds small multiples when a useful dimension exists, generates audit and source-pack files, and creates a Word report for Codex interpretation. The scripts do not make direct model API calls.
defaultPrompt: Use Period Comparison on the sales CSV or Excel file I provide.

Inspect the columns, ask only for required mappings that cannot be inferred, run the complete period-comparison chart package including year-over-year column, line, by-period, slope/dot, waterfall, compact scenario/variance tables, small multiples where applicable, audit, source pack and Word report, then interpret the largest movements from the source data.
